content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(0, 8, 0), (1, 5, 0), (3, 7, 6), (0, 5, 11), (0, 2, 12), (3, 9, 12), (1, 9, 14), (7, 9, 14), (0, 9, 17), (0, 7, 18), (2, 8, 18), (4, 8, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 0 exactly at time 17.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 17:

* Edge (0, 8, 0) has node 0 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 5, 0) has node 1 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (3, 7, 6) has node 3 and time 6. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 5, 11) has node 0 and time 11. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 2, 12) has node 0 and time 12. -> Ignore.
* Edge (3, 9, 12) has node 3 and time 12. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 9, 14) has node 1 and time 14. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (7, 9, 14) has node 7 and time 14. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 9, 17) has node 0 and time 17. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 7, 18) has node 0 and time 18. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 8, 18) has node 2 and time 18. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 8, 19) has node 4 and time 19. -> Ignore.

The nodes matched are 5, 9, and 7.

Answer: [5, 9, 7]
